en: back there and got your seatbelt fastened.
ko: 저기서 안전벨트를 매고 있었어. 벤은 어떻게 됐어?

en: What happened to Ben? Oh, somebody said that he got
transferred. Um, you know the best way to get back to headquarters?
ko: 본부로 돌아가는 가장 좋은 방법 알아?

en: Which way on? I'm all jerks around here!
ko: 어느 방향으로 가야 해? 여기 다들 이상해!

en: You told me to transfer him.
That was two days ago. Why didn't you check with me?
ko: 그건 이틀 전 일이야. 왜 나한테 확인하지 않았어?

en: First of all, that was yesterday.
Where is he? Do you know?
ko: 그는 어디 있어? 너 알고 있어?

en: You must think I'm demented. Not the word I would use, but I was a little surprised when I got the
ko: 내가 미쳤다고 생각하겠지. 그런 표현은 아니지만, 전화 받았을 때 조금 놀랐어.

en: call. Jules, I apologize if I overstepped in some way.
ko: 줄스, 내가 뭔가 잘못했으면 사과할게. 아니, 아니, 아니.

en: No, no, no, no. Please don't apologize.
Look, I have a lot going on and I...
